name: ed3design-skill-bundles
description: Engineering-discipline library for Claude Code: 47 skills, 6 hooks, 4 sub-agents, 5 Python tools across 6 thematic bundles. Empirically validated patterns.

plugins.name: token-savers
plugins.description: Token optimization for Claude Code: 3 skills + 5 Python tools delivering 70-98% token savings in typical workflows (PDF reads, image vision, web reads, vault searches, DB schema checks, Git diff summaries).

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Code-quality + Git disciplines for Python/SQL/Git projects. 16 skills (code review, Git hygiene, code patterns), 4 PreToolUse hooks for automatic Git enforcement, and 1 read-only code-reviewer sub-agent. Language- and framework-agnostic.

plugins.name: planning-disciplines
plugins.description: Planning + decision disciplines for any multi-phase project. 10 skills + 1 planning-assistant sub-agent. Process discipline that structurally prevents wished-for implementation.

plugins.name: async-forensik
plugins.description: Forensic disciplines for asyncio Python + container stacks. 7 skills + 1 forensik-detective sub-agent for hypothesis-test pipelines.

plugins.name: schema-discipline
plugins.description: SQL/schema disciplines that structurally prevent bug classes. 6 skills + 1 schema-validator sub-agent. Pattern correctness across DB engines (PostgreSQL/MySQL/SQLite).

plugins.name: skill-system-meta
plugins.description: Skill-system disciplines for Claude Code power users who build their own skills. 5 skills for skill lifecycle (TDD promotion, post-session review, sub-agent patterns, design-first iteration) + 1 UserPromptSubmit hook for session-end detection.
